rule.name: Architectural & Design Best Practices
rule.directive: All code and system design MUST follow: 1. **Separation of Concerns** - Single responsibility, clear layer boundaries 2. **Configuration Over Code** - Environment variables, YAML configs 3. **Observability by Default** - Health endpoints, structured logging 4. **Graceful Degradation** - Fallback models, retries, timeouts 5. **Idempotency** - Retriable operations, upsert patterns 6. **Documentation** - README per component, API contracts
